global_rules: CRITICAL: The answer is NEVER encoded in the visual. Visuals show setup only.
All coordinate planes use grid spacing of 1 unit unless labeled otherwise.
Dashed lines for asymptotes; open circles for excluded points (holes); closed circles for included endpoints.
Color: black for curve, blue for labeled values, red for unknown variables, gray for asymptotes.
All visuals must be renderable in SVG format for web delivery.

visual_specs.title: Domain and Range from Graph
visual_specs.description: A curve plotted on coordinate axes. Domain endpoints marked on x-axis; range endpoints on y-axis. Endpoints shown as open or closed dots but NOT labeled with coordinates.
visual_specs.format_hint: Set notation: State domain and range from this graph.

visual_specs.title: Key Features — Unlabeled Extrema
visual_specs.description: Polynomial graph showing local max, local min, x-intercepts, and y-intercept. All key points visible as dots but NOT labeled with coordinates.
visual_specs.format_hint: MC: Which statement about this function is true?

visual_specs.title: Composition of Functions — Two Graphs
visual_specs.description: Two separate graphs side by side: f on left, g on right. Specific x-values readable on g; y-values readable on f. Student traces f(g(x)).
visual_specs.format_hint: Numeric: Find f(g(2)) using both graphs.

visual_specs.title: Inverse Function — y=x Reflection
visual_specs.description: f(x) graphed (solid) and f⁻¹(x) graphed (dashed). Line y=x shown gray. No equations labeled — student identifies which is which.
visual_specs.format_hint: MC or expression: Which curve is f⁻¹? Write its equation.

visual_specs.title: Piecewise Function — Blank Graph
visual_specs.description: Coordinate plane with ONLY the boundary x-values marked on x-axis. Curve segments NOT drawn — student must identify correct graph from choices.
visual_specs.format_hint: Graph-match: Which graph matches the piecewise function definition?

visual_specs.title: Combined Transformations — Parent and Transformed
visual_specs.description: Parent function (solid) and transformed function (dashed) on same axes. Labels only say 'parent' and 'g' — no equation for g.
visual_specs.format_hint: MC: Which equation represents g in terms of f?

visual_specs.title: Complex Number Division Setup
visual_specs.description: Expression shown: (a+bi)/(c+di) with specific values. Conjugate of denominator shown in bracket below as a hint structure. Student completes the rationalization.
visual_specs.format_hint: Expression: Multiply numerator and denominator by the conjugate and simplify.

visual_specs.title: Quadratic Graph — Three Forms
visual_specs.description: Three parabolas on same axes, each in different form. No equations shown — student matches graph to form or identifies features.
visual_specs.format_hint: MC: Which graph could represent f(x) = 2(x-1)² - 3?

visual_specs.title: Quadratic Inequality — Boundary Parabola
visual_specs.description: Parabola boundary drawn (solid or dashed per inequality type). Shading NOT shown. x-intercepts marked as dots.
visual_specs.format_hint: MC or interval notation: What is the solution set?

visual_specs.title: Linear-Quadratic System — Graphical
visual_specs.description: Parabola and line graphed on same axes. Intersection points shown as open dots only — coordinates NOT labeled.
visual_specs.format_hint: Gridded: What are the x-coordinates of the intersection points?

visual_specs.title: Polynomial Graph — Zero Behavior
visual_specs.description: Polynomial showing crosses (odd multiplicity) and bounces (even multiplicity) at x-intercepts. Multiplicities NOT labeled — student reads behavior.
visual_specs.format_hint: MC: Which polynomial could match this graph?

visual_specs.title: Polynomial Graph Sketch — End Behavior
visual_specs.description: Blank coordinate plane with x-intercepts marked and arrows indicating end behavior direction. The curve between is NOT drawn.
visual_specs.format_hint: Graph-match: Which sketch matches the polynomial with these zeros and end behavior?

visual_specs.title: Sign Chart for Polynomial Zeros
visual_specs.description: Number line with critical points (zeros) marked. Sign intervals labeled +/- but filled in only for the first interval — student completes the sign chart.
visual_specs.format_hint: Expression: Complete the sign chart and state the solution set.

visual_specs.title: Rational Function — Asymptotes Without Labels
visual_specs.description: Rational function with visible horizontal and vertical asymptotes (dashed gray). Hole marked as open circle. Asymptote equations NOT labeled.
visual_specs.format_hint: Expression: Identify all asymptotes, holes, and key features.

visual_specs.title: Rational Inequality — Sign Chart
visual_specs.description: Number line with vertical asymptote and zero locations marked. The curve's positive/negative regions are visible above/below x-axis but NOT labeled.
visual_specs.format_hint: Interval notation: State the solution of the rational inequality.

visual_specs.title: Basic Radical Function Graphs
visual_specs.description: Two curves on same axes: y=√x (solid) and y=∛x (dashed). Start points and one additional labeled point per curve. No equations shown.
visual_specs.format_hint: MC: Which curve has domain and range of all real numbers?

visual_specs.title: Transformed Radical Function — Identify Graph
visual_specs.description: Four possible graphs labeled A–D. Parent radical function known; transformed function to be matched.
visual_specs.format_hint: MC: Which graph represents g(x) = -√(x+3) + 2?

visual_specs.title: Exponential Transformations — Two Curves
visual_specs.description: Parent y=2^x (solid) and transformed g (dashed) on same axes. y-intercepts visible. No equation for g shown.
visual_specs.format_hint: Expression: Write the equation of g in the form a·2^(x-h)+k.

visual_specs.title: Logarithmic Function — Vertical Asymptote Unlabeled
visual_specs.description: Log function with visible vertical asymptote (dashed), x-intercept as dot, and one additional labeled point. Equation NOT shown.
visual_specs.format_hint: Expression: Write the equation of this log function.

visual_specs.title: Convergent vs Divergent Series
visual_specs.description: Two dot-plots showing partial sums Sₙ: one converging (leveling off) and one diverging (growing without bound). Values NOT labeled.
visual_specs.format_hint: MC: Which series converges? What can you say about the sum?

visual_specs.title: Sigma Notation — Table of Values
visual_specs.description: A table showing index values i = 1 to n and corresponding term values. The sigma expression written at top but the sum NOT computed.
visual_specs.format_hint: Numeric: Compute the sum from the table.

visual_specs.title: Mutually Exclusive vs Inclusive Events
visual_specs.description: Two Venn diagrams side by side: one with overlapping circles (inclusive) and one with non-overlapping circles (mutually exclusive). Events labeled A and B — no probability values shown.
visual_specs.format_hint: MC: Which diagram represents mutually exclusive events? Explain.

visual_specs.title: Two-Way Frequency Table — Conditional Probability
visual_specs.description: Table with two categorical variables. Row and column totals shown. Some cells blank for student to compute. Conditional probability formula NOT shown.
visual_specs.format_hint: Numeric: Find P(A|B) from this table.

visual_specs.title: Normal Distribution — Empirical Rule
visual_specs.description: Bell curve with mean marked. Three colored regions indicating 1σ, 2σ, 3σ bands. Percentages NOT labeled — student applies 68-95-99.7 rule.
visual_specs.format_hint: MC: What percent of data falls within the shaded region?

visual_specs.title: Probability Distribution Table — Incomplete
visual_specs.description: Table with X values in one row, P(X) values in another. One P(X) value missing — student uses the rule that all probabilities sum to 1.
visual_specs.format_hint: Numeric: Find the missing probability. Verify the distribution is valid.

visual_specs.title: Circle on Coordinate Plane
visual_specs.description: Circle plotted with center dot (not labeled) and radius drawn but not labeled with length. Student identifies equation.
visual_specs.format_hint: Expression: Write the equation of this circle in standard form.

visual_specs.title: Parabola — Vertical Axis
visual_specs.description: Parabola with vertex dot (not labeled) and axis of symmetry as dashed line. Focus and directrix NOT drawn.
visual_specs.format_hint: Expression: Write the equation and identify the vertex.

visual_specs.title: Ellipse — Center at Origin
visual_specs.description: Ellipse centered at origin. Vertices and co-vertices shown as dots but not labeled. Foci NOT shown.
visual_specs.format_hint: Expression: Write the equation and state the lengths of both axes.

visual_specs.title: Hyperbola — Two Branches
visual_specs.description: Hyperbola with two branches and asymptotes as dashed gray lines. Vertices visible but NOT labeled. Equations of asymptotes NOT shown.
visual_specs.format_hint: Expression: Write the equation and find the asymptotes.

visual_specs.title: Classify Conic — Four Possible Graphs
visual_specs.description: Four graphs labeled A-D: circle, ellipse, parabola, hyperbola. No equations shown. Student matches each to its general equation.
visual_specs.format_hint: Matching: Match each graph to its equation type.

visual_specs.title: System — Conic and Line Intersection
visual_specs.description: Conic and line graphed together. Intersection points shown as OPEN dots only — coordinates NOT labeled.
visual_specs.format_hint: Numeric: Find all intersection points of the system.

visual_specs.title: Matrix Multiplication — Dimension Check
visual_specs.description: Two matrix outlines shown with dimensions labeled (mxn and pxq). Inner dimensions highlighted to show compatibility rule. Product matrix outline shown empty.
visual_specs.format_hint: MC: Can these matrices be multiplied? If so, what are the dimensions of the product?

visual_specs.title: Matrix Transformation — Pre-Image Only
visual_specs.description: Pre-image triangle shown on coordinate plane. Center of transformation at origin. Image NOT drawn — student applies transformation matrix.
visual_specs.format_hint: Numeric: Apply matrix T to find image P'Q'R'.
